title: Graduate Certificate Apply - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Graduate Certificate Apply - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Graduate Certificate Apply
Apply now
Request info
Find the application requirements for each graduate certificate program. (Note that some programs are administered through Northeastern colleges other than Khoury College.)
Program admissions requirements
Inclusive Computer Science Education graduate certificate
To apply for admission to the Inclusive Computer Science Education graduate certificate, you must submit the following:
Online application
and fee
Unofficial undergraduate/graduate transcripts (you can submit official transcripts from all colleges/universities attended at the time of admission)
Statement of purpose that should include career goals and expected outcomes and benefits from the program
Recent professional resumé listing detailed position responsibilities
Two letters of recommendation
Evidence of service as a current K-12 educator, preferably by a letter of recommendation
Acceptance to Khoury College is granted upon recommendation of the college graduate committee after a review of the completed application. Learn more about the
Inclusive Computer Science Education graduate certificate program
.
Domestic students:
For fall semester admission, applications are due August 1. For spring semester admission, applications are due December 1.
Cybersecurity graduate certificate
To apply for admission to the Cybersecurity graduate certificate, you must submit the following:
Online application
and fee
PDF or scanned copies of unofficial undergraduate transcripts (you can submit official transcripts from colleges/universities attended at the time of admission)
Statement of purpose, including description of academic or professional goals and relevant work experience
Two confidential letters of reference from individuals that know your academic record and/or potential for graduate study
Acceptance to Khoury College is granted upon recommendation of the college graduate committee after a review of the completed application. Learn more about the
Cybersecurity graduate certificate program
.
Domestic students:
For fall semester admission, applications are due August 1. For spring semester admission, applications are due December 1.
Data Analytics graduate certificate
To apply for admission to the Data Analytics graduate certificate program, you must
submit an online application
that includes:
PDF or scanned copies of unofficial undergraduate/graduate transcripts (you can submit official transcripts from colleges/universities attended at the time of admission)
Statement of purpose, including description of relevant work experience
Recent professional resume listing detailed position responsibilities
Reference letter from an individual who knows your academic or professional record and/or potential for graduate study
Note:
An undergraduate course in statistics must be successfully completed before beginning your program, but not necessarily before application submission.
Domestic students:
For fall semester admission, applications are due August 1. For spring semester admission, applications are due December 1.
Questions:
For questions about the
Data Analytics graduate certificate program
, please contact the
College of Social Sciences and Humanities (CSSH)
.
Health Informatics Management and Exchange graduate certificate
To apply for admission to the Health Informatics Management and Exchange graduate certificate program, you must
submit an online application
that includes:
PDF or scanned copies of unofficial undergraduate/graduate transcripts (you can submit official transcripts from colleges/universities attended at the time of admission)
The Foreign Credential Evaluation (FCE) is a required assessment of all transcripts and documents from non-US accredited post-secondary education institutions (review the
FCE requirements
by country)
Statement of purpose that includes career goals and expected outcomes/benefits from the program
Recent professional resumé listing detailed position responsibilities
Three confidential letters of recommendation
Note:
Acceptance is granted upon recommendation of the college graduate committee after a review of the completed application.
Domestic students:
For fall and spring semester admission deadlines, please contact the
Bouvé College of Health Sciences Graduate Admissions
team.
Questions:
For questions about the
Health Informatics Management and Exchange graduate certificate program
, please contact
Jay Spitulnik
.
Have questions?
Contact the Khoury Graduate Admissions Team. We’re here to help!
Contact us
